message:
test(proptest): add 12 property tests for pattern trigger coverage gaps

pattern_trigger: 11→23 tests (TriggerCategory serde for all 6 variants, Display lowercase, TriggerPattern serde, TriggerMatch serde, has_errors/has_completions false paths, pattern_count matches input, case-insensitive matches both cases, case-sensitive rejects wrong case, locate offsets match actual pattern, default scanner count, no panic on binary input)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
